content.full_text:
March 5, 2007

A. Crawford Cooley
P. O. Box 1146
Novato, CA 94948

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-038

Dear Mr. Cooley:

This is to confirm that, pursuant to our telephone conversation on February 28, 2007, no written response is needed to your letter of February 23, 2007. Therefore, we are withdrawing your request for advice.

If you have any further questions, please call me at 916-322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John Symkowick
Staff Services Analyst
